title: AN ACT GRANTING TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF LEGANES, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, THE USUFRUCT OF A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE SAID PROVINCE, FOR COMMUNAL PURPOSES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2448 / 45 OG No. 7, 2760 (July, 1949)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 366, June 09, 1949 ]

AN ACT GRANTING TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF LEGANES, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, THE USUFRUCT OF A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE SAID PROVINCE, FOR COMMUNAL PURPOSES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. Any improvements done on the property by any occupant previous to or at the time of the approval of this Act shall be respected.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect as of April twenty-fourth, nineteen hundred and forty-six.

Approved, June 9, 1949.
